title: Participle Clauses
description: Compress full adverbial and relative clauses into elegant reduced forms — present participles for simultaneous/causal action, past participles for passive reduced relatives, perfect participles for earlier past action — achieving concision in formal and literary writing.
sources: CEFR C1 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Martin Hewings, Advanced Grammar in Use (participle clauses: adverbial and reduced relative, Units 103–106)
